message:
chore(beads): add detailed implementation comments to UX audit tasks

Each task now contains comprehensive self-documenting comments including:

## Comments Added To:
- phage_explorer-1cwn: Touch target audit with WCAG 2.5.5 methodology
- phage_explorer-2dzx: Interaction feedback with timing tokens and CSS examples
- phage_explorer-7hlh: SequenceView skeleton loader with 200ms delay pattern
- phage_explorer-milk: Shared Skeleton component architecture
- phage_explorer-lge5: Error states feature overview
- phage_explorer-y5wb: Mobile touch UX comprehensive plan
- phage_explorer-vss3: Keyboard navigation with focus management
- phage_explorer-v6fm: WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility requirements
- phage_explorer-s6nf: Data loading UX patterns
- phage_explorer-taos: Visual consistency audit
- phage_explorer-wq08: State management fixes
- phage_explorer-pcn6: Performance perception improvements

## Comment Structure:
- Problem statement with file:line references
- Current code snippets showing issues
- Solution architecture with implementation code
- Premium app comparisons (Linear, Stripe, Figma)
- Files to modify list
- Testing checklist
- Success criteria

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
